scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.build:web: tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && cp apps/web/src/index.html apps/web/dist/index.html && cp apps/web/src/styles.css apps/web/dist/styles.css
scripts.build:server: mkdir -p apps/server/bin && GOCACHE=/tmp/lmy-go-cache GOTMPDIR=/tmp go build -o apps/server/bin/harness-server ./apps/server
scripts.check: npm run check:web && GOCACHE=/tmp/lmy-go-cache GOTMPDIR=/tmp go test ./apps/server/...
